title: ApprovalRecord
description: Persistence record for a gated approval interaction lifecycle.

run_id.description: The run this record belongs to.

phase_from.description: Workflow phase that triggered the approval request.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when approval was requested.

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was made. Null when pending.

decision_actor.description: Actor identity of who made the decision. Null when pending.

event_ids.description: Event IDs of surface events associated with this record.
